text:
Walt Disney holds the record for the most wins for a single person, with 22 trophies across his career.
Disney also holds the record for the most nominations, with 59. The highest tally for any living person is Star Wars composer John Williams, who has 54.
In the acting categories, Katharine Hepburn won the most Oscars, with four wins in total, all for best actress.

title: Oscars 2026: What to expect and who will win
